items.title: S01E01 - Mod, Mod Lucy
items.summary: Cheapskate Uncle Harry hire's his nephew & neice, Craig and Kim, as the band needed by a client at the Unique Employment Agency. Lead vocalist Kim develops laryngitis, however, and mom Lucy, decked out in modern fashions, fills in for her.

infolabels.title: Mod, Mod Lucy
infolabels.plot: Cheapskate Uncle Harry hire's his nephew & neice, Craig and Kim, as the band needed by a client at the Unique Employment Agency. Lead vocalist Kim develops laryngitis, however, and mom Lucy, decked out in modern fashions, fills in for her.

items.title: S01E02 - Lucy Visits Jack Benny
items.summary: The Carter family vacations in Jack Benny's desert mansion. Percieved as a budget getaway, Benny loads charge after charge to up the bill. This exceptional episode has a cameo by Jackie Gleason playing his classic Ralph Kramden character from the Honeymooners.

infolabels.title: Lucy Visits Jack Benny
infolabels.plot: The Carter family vacations in Jack Benny's desert mansion. Percieved as a budget getaway, Benny loads charge after charge to up the bill. This exceptional episode has a cameo by Jackie Gleason playing his classic Ralph Kramden character from the Honeymooners.

items.title: S01E03 - Lucy the Process Server
items.summary: Lucy confuses a bank deposit and a summons. Amusing episode borrowing on older Lucille Ball plots.

infolabels.title: Lucy the Process Server
infolabels.plot: Lucy confuses a bank deposit and a summons. Amusing episode borrowing on older Lucille Ball plots.

items.title: S01E04 - Lucy and Miss Shelly Winters
items.summary: A movie producer is worried when an actress' pre-filming jitters is subdued by over-eating. Lucy, after contacted at the Unique Employeement Agency, moves in with actress Shelly to help her with a crash diet.

infolabels.title: Lucy and Miss Shelly Winters
infolabels.plot: A movie producer is worried when an actress' pre-filming jitters is subdued by over-eating. Lucy, after contacted at the Unique Employeement Agency, moves in with actress Shelly to help her with a crash diet.

items.title: S01E05 - Lucy the Conclusion Jumper
items.summary: Lucy jumps to the wrong conclusion! Daughter Lucie is working on a school project about teenage marriage, and Lucy fears she is about to elope.

infolabels.title: Lucy the Conclusion Jumper
infolabels.plot: Lucy jumps to the wrong conclusion! Daughter Lucie is working on a school project about teenage marriage, and Lucy fears she is about to elope.

items.title: S01E06 - Lucy's Impossible Mission
items.summary: The first of several episodes of Here's Lucy that has her working undercover. This episode is based on the long running Desilu tv show, Mission Impossible, and features the Carter family impersonating Middle Eastern royalty.

infolabels.title: Lucy's Impossible Mission
infolabels.plot: The first of several episodes of Here's Lucy that has her working undercover. This episode is based on the long running Desilu tv show, Mission Impossible, and features the Carter family impersonating Middle Eastern royalty.

items.title: S01E07 - Lucy and Eva Gabor
items.summary: Uncle Harry sends screenplay author Eva Von Kirsten to hide out at Lucy's home as a safe haven to complete her latest work. As usual, Lucy takes her job very seriously.

infolabels.title: Lucy and Eva Gabor
infolabels.plot: Uncle Harry sends screenplay author Eva Von Kirsten to hide out at Lucy's home as a safe haven to complete her latest work. As usual, Lucy takes her job very seriously.

items.summary: The kids take Lucy out for a birthday dinner. Unfortunately, Craig forgets to bring his money, and Lucy schemes to get out of paying the bill.

infolabels.plot: The kids take Lucy out for a birthday dinner. Unfortunately, Craig forgets to bring his money, and Lucy schemes to get out of paying the bill.

items.title: S02E01 - Lucy Joins the Air Force Academy (1)
items.summary: Uncle Harry is hired to drive a motor home from California to Colorado, and foolishly agrees to take Lucy and the kids along for the ride. Lucy takes over driving so Harry can take a nap, and decides to take a detour, setting up this and the following three episodes.

items.title: S02E09 - Lucy and the Used Car Dealer
items.summary: Needing another means of transportation, Kim and Craig buy an old broken down car from Cheerful Charlie, the local car salesman. When the car no longer works, Lucy and Harry scheme to get Charlie to take it back for more than it's worth.

items.title: S02E11 - Lucy and Johnny Carson
items.summary: Lucy appears on the Johnny Carson show and plays ""stump the band"", and wins a dinner at the Brown Derby. Unfortunately for Johnny Carson, Lucy and Uncle Harry coincidentally dine at the Brown Derby when Carson and McMahon are also dining. Naturally, Lucy believes she must have won a dinner with Johnny and Ed and joins them.

infolabels.title: Lucy and Johnny Carson
infolabels.plot: Lucy appears on the Johnny Carson show and plays ""stump the band"", and wins a dinner at the Brown Derby. Unfortunately for Johnny Carson, Lucy and Uncle Harry coincidentally dine at the Brown Derby when Carson and McMahon are also dining. Naturally, Lucy believes she must have won a dinner with Johnny and Ed and joins them.

items.title: S02E12 - Lucy and the Generation Gap
items.summary: Kim and Craig are in charge of producing the school play, and decide its theme should be the Generation Gap. When they have casting problems, Lucy and Harry wind up playing the parents, and they all put on a really spectacular show.

infolabels.title: Lucy and the Generation Gap
infolabels.plot: Kim and Craig are in charge of producing the school play, and decide its theme should be the Generation Gap. When they have casting problems, Lucy and Harry wind up playing the parents, and they all put on a really spectacular show.

items.title: S02E13 - Lucy and the Bogie Affair
items.summary: The kids find a lost sheep dog and bring it home. After naming the sheep dog Humphrey Bogart, a litter of puppies are born. After the puppies are giving to new homes, Uncle Harry arrives with a want ad offering a reward.

infolabels.title: Lucy and the Bogie Affair
infolabels.plot: The kids find a lost sheep dog and bring it home. After naming the sheep dog Humphrey Bogart, a litter of puppies are born. After the puppies are giving to new homes, Uncle Harry arrives with a want ad offering a reward.

items.title: S02E14 - Lucy Protects Her Job
items.summary: Harry suggests Lucy is overworked and should hire an assistant. Suspecting Harry is really attempting to replace her, Lucy has Kim arrive to the office as temp secretary Shoiley Shopenauer, the world's worst office assistant.

infolabels.title: Lucy Protects Her Job
infolabels.plot: Harry suggests Lucy is overworked and should hire an assistant. Suspecting Harry is really attempting to replace her, Lucy has Kim arrive to the office as temp secretary Shoiley Shopenauer, the world's worst office assistant.

items.title: S03E01 - Lucy Meets the Burtons
items.summary: Richard Burton, the movie star, escapes riotous fans by wearing a plumber's disguise. Lucy Carter mistakes him for a much needed plumber. Sam (Burton), the plumber, escapes to the Carter household. Lucy later finds a remarkable diamond ring in his discarded over-alls. By the time Lucy discovers it is THE famous Elizabeth Taylor diamond ring, it is already stuck on her finger. The end result is a creshendo of comedy as Liz feverishly tries to get the ring off Lucy's finger. Ultimately, Lucy's arms are used as Liz Taylor's while Richard & Liz do a scheduled press conference.

infolabels.title: Lucy Meets the Burtons
infolabels.plot: Richard Burton, the movie star, escapes riotous fans by wearing a plumber's disguise. Lucy Carter mistakes him for a much needed plumber. Sam (Burton), the plumber, escapes to the Carter household. Lucy later finds a remarkable diamond ring in his discarded over-alls. By the time Lucy discovers it is THE famous Elizabeth Taylor diamond ring, it is already stuck on her finger. The end result is a creshendo of comedy as Liz feverishly tries to get the ring off Lucy's finger. Ultimately, Lucy's arms are used as Liz Taylor's while Richard & Liz do a scheduled press conference.

items.title: S04E07 - Someone's On the Ski Lift with Dinah
items.summary: Lucy encounters Dinah Shore while on a ski trip. The two get stuck together on a ski lift, where Lucy proceeds to sing a medley of Dinah's hits to her, and otherwise annoy the singer.

items.title: S04E11 - Ginger Rogers Comes to Tea
items.summary: Lucille and Uncle Harry attend a Ginger Rogers film festival. Ms. Rogers attends in disguise, and is seated next to ""you-know-who"". When Lucille offends Ms. Rogers, she leaves the theater, but also leaves her purse. Discovering the true identity to the stranger, Harry & Lucy plot to return the purse to meet her again.

items.title: S04E17 - Lucy and the Little Old Lady
items.summary: When an old lady comes in the enployment agency looking for a job because she has nowhere to go, Lucy decides to let her stay at her house. When Mrs. Brady sells land to Harry, Kim tells them about a similar sounding scam which gives Lucy and Harry the idea to let the Mrs. Brady have a seance in which they dress up as Napoleon and Josephine to convince her to refund Harry his money.

When Mrs. Brady sells land to Harry, Kim tells them about a similar sounding scam which gives Lucy and Harry the idea to let the Mrs. Brady have a seance in which they dress up as Napoleon and Josephine to convince her to refund Harry his money.

items.title: S04E18 - Lucy and the Chinese Curse
items.summary: Lucy saves a man's life, and according to Chinese custom, he is indepted to her. Lucy and Kim sheme to correct an annoying situation.

items.title: S04E19 - Lucy's Replacement
items.summary: Harry gets a new office computer, and finds Lucy obsolete. Out of work Lucy get a new job and hates it! Lucy and Kim scheme to make the computer obsolete.

infolabels.title: Lucy's Replacement

items.title: S04E20 - Kim Moves Out
items.summary: Kim has decided it is time for her to move out of the house, but Lucy becomes an annoying mother hen. Ultimately, Kim plans to teach Mother a lesson.

items.title: S04E21 - Lucy Sublets the Office
items.summary: Lucy is promoted to office manager, and looks for ways to save money. Her solution is to sublet half the office to a toy maker.

infolabels.title: Lucy Sublets the Office
infolabels.plot: Lucy is promoted to office manager, and looks for ways to save money. Her solution is to sublet half the office to a toy maker.

items.title: S04E22 - Lucy's Punctured Romance
items.summary: Lucy has a new boyfriend, but Kim and Uncle Harry are worried. The milkman doesn't help matters when he informs the pair the Lucy's boyfriend is a playboy.

infolabels.title: Lucy's Punctured Romance
infolabels.plot: Lucy has a new boyfriend, but Kim and Uncle Harry are worried. The milkman doesn't help matters when he informs the pair the Lucy's boyfriend is a playboy.

items.title: S04E23 - With Viv As a Friend, Who Needs an Enemy?
items.summary: Viv shows up for a surprise visit, and tells Lucy she may stay in California for a year, but everything goes awry when Harry fires Lucy and hires Viv in her place, making Lucy furious. After a few weeks, Harry can't stand Viv and Viv can't stand Harry. Lucy comes up with a scheme to get Viv to quit, but Kim blabs the whole thing to Viv. In the end, everything ends up back the way it was.

infolabels.title: With Viv As a Friend, Who Needs an Enemy?
infolabels.plot: Viv shows up for a surprise visit, and tells Lucy she may stay in California for a year, but everything goes awry when Harry fires Lucy and hires Viv in her place, making Lucy furious. After a few weeks, Harry can't stand Viv and Viv can't stand Harry. Lucy comes up with a scheme to get Viv to quit, but Kim blabs the whole thing to Viv. In the end, everything ends up back the way it was.

items.title: S05E08 - Lucy and Petula Clark
items.summary: Lucy tricks Harry into sending her to be Petula Clark's ""Girl Friday"" to assist with a recording session. Lucy's over protection of pregnant Clark nearly wrecks the entire session, but ends by becoming the new gimmick for her record, a human ""waa waa petal"".

items.title: S05E10 - Lucy and Dirty Gertie
items.summary: After cleaning her fireplace, Lucy takes a crate of apples down to a neighbor. She is mistaken for Dirty Gertie by a crook who enlists the homeless woman for good luck. Lucy is asked to go undercover to held apprehend the criminal.

infolabels.title: Lucy and Dirty Gertie

items.title: S05E11 - Lucy and Donny Osmond
items.summary: Lucy and Kim attend a Donny Osmond concert with cousin Patricia (Eve Plumb), who is crazy for the 14 year old singer. Donny, spots Kim in the audience, and he falls in love at first sight. Kim believes the flowers and letters are for Patricia, but soon discovers the mix-up. Realizing Donny volunteered to perform at Kim's Charity function because of the mix-up, Kim feels obligated to set the record straight.

infolabels.title: Lucy and Donny Osmond

Realizing Donny volunteered to perform at Kim's Charity function because of the mix-up, Kim feels obligated to set the record straight.
